metadata.description: On-demand NYSE stock scanner using EdenFinTech deep value turnaround strategy

plugins.name: edenfintech-scanner
plugins.description: On-demand NYSE stock scanner using EdenFinTech deep value turnaround strategy. Multi-agent pipeline: screener filters NYSE stocks (60%+ off ATH, solvency, growth), analyst agents score survivors on valuation, catalysts, and moats. Outputs ranked reports with position sizing.
